name: Ministry of Post-Secondary Education and Future Skills

goals.short_name: Post-secondary education in B.C. is accessible and affordable

main_services.name: Choose and apply to a post-secondary program
Complete adult upgrading and English language learning
Access Indigenous post-secondary education and skills training

goals.short_name: Skilled trades training builds B.C.'s workforce

main_services.name: Find work and labour market information

goals.short_name: Post-secondary institutions and training providers meet quality standards

main_services.name: Get help with a private training institution
Operate a post-secondary institution or training program

goals.short_name: Internationally trained professionals and newcomers can work and settle in B.C.

main_services.name: Immigrate to and settle in B.C.

acts.summary: Continues and governs B.C.'s colleges, institutes and BCIT, including their boards, education councils and continuing education programs.

sections.title: Continuation and operation of colleges and institutes
sections.description: Defines colleges, college regions and institutions and sets out board and education council governance for public colleges and institutes, including BCIT.

services.name: Find a post-secondary institution or program
services.ms_name: Choose and apply to a post-secondary program

acts.summary: Continues and governs B.C.'s public universities, including boards of governors, senates, chancellors and continuing education programs.

sections.title: Continuation and operation of universities
sections.description: Establishes and continues B.C.'s public universities and sets out governance through boards of governors and senates.

services.name: Find a post-secondary institution or program
services.ms_name: Choose and apply to a post-secondary program

acts.summary: Requires private and out-of-province public post-secondary institutions to obtain ministerial consent to grant degrees or use the word "university" in British Columbia; does not apply to B.C. public post-secondary institutions.

sections.title: Granting of degrees and use of "university" restricted
sections.description: Prohibits granting a degree or using the term "university" without ministerial consent or specific legislative authority, subject to exemptions such as theological degrees.

services.name: Check if an institution is authorized to grant degrees
Apply for degree-granting authority in B.C.
services.ms_name: Operate a post-secondary institution or training program

acts.summary: Regulates private training institutions offering career training programs, requiring certification, program approval, an online institution directory, and consumer protections including the Student Tuition Protection Fund.

sections.title: Certificate required to provide career training programs
sections.description: Requires institutions to hold a certificate to provide career training programs and sets out the application and issuance process.

services.name: Apply for certification to operate a private training institution
services.ms_name: Operate a post-secondary institution or training program

sections.title: Online directory of institutions
sections.description: Requires the registrar to maintain an online directory of certified institutions, including enforcement actions taken against them.

services.name: Check if a private training institution is certified

sections.title: Consumer protection and Student Tuition Protection Fund
sections.description: Sets out the dispute resolution process for student complaints (s.19) and the Student Tuition Protection Fund, including claims and repayment (s.20-27).

services.name: File a complaint or tuition refund claim against a private training institution
services.ms_name: Get help with a private training institution

acts.summary: Replaced the Industry Training Authority Act, transforming the Industry Training Authority into SkilledTradesBC and establishing Skilled Trades Certification (compulsory trades) requiring registered apprentices, Trade Qualifiers or certified journeypersons in designated trades.

sections.title: Apprenticeship registration and trades training system
sections.description: Establishes SkilledTradesBC's authority to register apprentices, approve training providers and issue Certificates of Apprenticeship, Qualification and Red Seal Endorsements.

services.name: Get certified as a journeyperson through a certification exam

sections.title: Compulsory trades certification requirements
sections.description: Requires workers in designated compulsory trades to be a registered apprentice, Trade Qualifier or certified journeyperson, and sets employer supervision-ratio and workforce-reporting obligations.

services.name: Meet Skilled Trades Certification requirements in a compulsory trade
Sponsor an apprentice as an employer

acts.summary: Requires regulatory authorities to increase fairness, efficiency, transparency and accountability in recognizing international credentials for 29 professions, overseen by a superintendent within the Office for International Credential Recognition.

sections.title: Oversight of regulatory authority credential recognition processes
sections.description: Establishes a superintendent to monitor regulatory authority performance, enforce compliance, and remove barriers such as Canadian work experience requirements and redundant language testing.

services.name: Have your international professional credentials recognized by a B.C. regulator

acts.full_name: First Nations Mandated Post-Secondary Institutes Act
acts.summary: Recognizes First Nations Mandated Post-Secondary Institutes (FNMPSIs) as a pillar of B.C.'s post-secondary system and commits the province to ongoing operational and capacity funding for eligible institutes.

sections.title: Recognition and funding of FNMPSIs
sections.description: Defines First Nations Mandated Post-Secondary Institutes and commits government to providing ongoing operational and capacity funding to eligible institutes.

services.name: Attend a First Nations mandated post-secondary institute
services.ms_name: Access Indigenous post-secondary education and skills training
